top3.sql:
SELECT c_customer_id, SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_purchase_amount
FROM web_sales
JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
JOIN web_site ON ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk
WHERE ca_state = 'IL'
  AND web_company_name = 'pri'
  AND ws_sold_date_sk >= (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_date = '1999-02-01')
  AND ws_sold_date_sk <= (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_date = '1999-04-02')
GROUP BY c_customer_id
ORDE...

final.sql:
SELECT c_customer_id, SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_purchase_amount
FROM web_sales
JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
JOIN web_site ON ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk
WHERE ca_state = 'IL'
  AND web_company_name = 'pri'
  AND ws_sold_date_sk >= (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_date = '1999-02-01')
  AND ws_sold_date_sk <= (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_date = '1999-04-02')
GROUP BY c_customer_id
ORDE...
